response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks the specific C++ on Windows focus required for this role. Their background includes Node.js, TypeScript, Java, and Dlang, with minimal evidence of C++ development in recent years. Additionally, there is no mention of SQL Server/Oracle experience, fixed-income systems, or capital markets domain knowledge. While their communication skills are noted, the core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with 15+ years of experience in diverse domains
Proven ability to work with high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling)
Experience with CI/CD, TDD, and modern development practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience on Windows platform (required skill)
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
No mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory skill requirement)

key_factors.factor: Fixed Income / Capital Markets domain knowledge
